scripts.test:api:ping: playwright test api-request-context.remote.playwright.spec.ts --grep 'GET /ping returns 200 and JSON|POST /auth with invalid credentials returns 401' --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e:dev:run: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; PLAYWRIGHT_BLOB_OUTPUT_FILE=blob-report/01-dev-accessibility.zip PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT_NAME=dev-e2e-results-accessibility.xml playwright test ensure-accessibility-pupil.setup.playwright.ts mtc-accessibility-check.playwright.spec.ts --project=dev-accessibility-setup --project=dev-accessibility --workers=1 ${PW_E2E_ARGS:---reporter=blob} || EXIT_CODE=$?; PLAYWRIGHT_BLOB_OUTPUT_FILE=blob-report/02-dev-main.zip PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT_NAME=dev-e2e-results-main.xml playwright test --project=dev-check --project=dev-admin --workers=1 ${PW_E2E_ARGS:---reporter=blob} || EXIT_CODE=$?; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e:dev: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; npm run report:clean || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run test:e2e:dev:run || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run report:merge:html || EXIT_CODE=$?; if [ -z "${CI:-}" ]; then npx playwright show-report || true; fi; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e:test:run: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; PLAYWRIGHT_BLOB_OUTPUT_FILE=blob-report/04-test-accessibility.zip PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT_NAME=test-e2e-results-accessibility.xml playwright test ensure-accessibility-pupil.setup.playwright.ts mtc-accessibility-check.playwright.spec.ts --project=test-accessibility-setup --project=test-accessibility --workers=1 ${PW_E2E_ARGS:---reporter=blob} || EXIT_CODE=$?; PLAYWRIGHT_BLOB_OUTPUT_FILE=blob-report/05-test-main.zip PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT_NAME=test-e2e-results-main.xml playwright test --project=test-check --project=test-admin --workers=1 ${PW_E2E_ARGS:---reporter=blob} || EXIT_CODE=$?; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e:test: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; npm run report:clean || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run test:e2e:test:run || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run report:merge:html || EXIT_CODE=$?; if [ -z "${CI:-}" ]; then npx playwright show-report || true; fi; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e:preprod:run: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; PLAYWRIGHT_BLOB_OUTPUT_FILE=blob-report/07-preprod-main.zip PLAYWRIGHT_JUNIT_OUTPUT_NAME=preprod-e2e-results-main.xml playwright test mtc-signin-and-check.playwright.spec.ts mtc-signin-and-try-it-out.playwright.spec.ts --project=preprod-check --workers=1 ${PW_E2E_ARGS:---reporter=blob} || EXIT_CODE=$?; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e:preprod: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; npm run report:clean || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run test:e2e:preprod:run || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run report:merge:html || EXIT_CODE=$?; if [ -z "${CI:-}" ]; then npx playwright show-report || true; fi; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e: bash -c 'EXIT_CODE=0; npm run report:clean || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run test:e2e:dev:run || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run test:e2e:test:run || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run test:e2e:preprod:run || EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run report:merge:html || EXIT_CODE=$?; if [ -z "${CI:-}" ]; then npx playwright show-report || true; fi; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test:e2e:dev:html: npm run report:clean && PW_E2E_ARGS='--reporter=blob' npm run test:e2e:dev && npm run report:merge:html
scripts.test:e2e:preprod:html: npm run report:clean && PW_E2E_ARGS='--reporter=blob' npm run test:e2e:preprod && npm run report:merge:html
scripts.test:e2e:html: npm run report:clean && PW_E2E_ARGS='--reporter=blob' npm run test:e2e && npm run report:merge:html
